<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>The Google AI Toolkit | Gemini, Gems, NotebookLM & More — MTM Together Accelerator</title>
  <meta name="description" content="Gemini, Gems, NotebookLM, AI Studio — Google built an entire AI ecosystem and most nonprofits don't know it exists. A 4-week hands-on accelerator from Meet the Moment.">

  <meta property="og:title" content="The Google AI Toolkit — Gemini, Gems, NotebookLM & More">
  <meta property="og:description" content="Google built an entire AI ecosystem and most nonprofits don't know it exists. A 4-week hands-on accelerator from Meet the Moment.">
  <meta property="og:type" content="website">

  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;0,800;1,400;1,600&family=Source+Sans+3:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

  <style>
    :root {
      --orange: #e8792b;
      --orange-light: #f5a623;
      --amber: #d4740e;
      --navy: #1a2744;
      --navy-deep: #0f1a2e;
      --navy-mid: #2a3a5c;
      --cyan: #1ab1d2;
      --cyan-muted: #7ec8d9;
      --cream: #fdf6ee;
      --cream-dark: #f5ead8;
      --warm-white: #fefcf9;
      --text-primary: #1a2744;
      --text-body: #3d4a5c;
      --text-secondary: #6b7a8d;
      --text-muted: #94a3b8;
      --border: #e8ddd0;
      --border-light: #f0e8dc;
      /* Google colors */
      --g-blue: #4285f4;
      --g-red: #ea4335;
      --g-yellow: #fbbc05;
      --g-green: #34a853;

      --font-display: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
      --font-body: 'Source Sans 3', 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif;
      --ease-out-expo: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
    }

    *, *::before, *::after { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
    html { scroll-behavior:smooth; }
    body { font-family:var(--font-body); color:var(--text-body); line-height:1.7; background:var(--warm-white); -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased; overflow-x:hidden; }
    h1, h2, h3, h4 { font-family:var(--font-display); color:var(--navy); line-height:1.2; }
    .section-label { font-family:var(--font-body); font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.15em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--orange); margin-bottom:0.75rem; }

    /* Animations */
    @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(32px); } to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); } }
    @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity:0; } to { opacity:1; } }
    @keyframes pulseGlow { 0%,100% { box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(232,121,43,0.3); } 50% { box-shadow:0 0 0 12px rgba(232,121,43,0); } }
    @keyframes shimmer { 0% { background-position:-200% 0; } 100% { background-position:200% 0; } }

    .reveal { opacity:0; transform:translateY(32px); transition:opacity 0.8s var(--ease-out-expo), transform 0.8s var(--ease-out-expo); }
    .reveal.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
    .reveal-delay-1 { transition-delay:0.1s; }
    .reveal-delay-2 { transition-delay:0.2s; }
    .reveal-delay-3 { transition-delay:0.3s; }
    .reveal-delay-4 { transition-delay:0.4s; }
    .reveal-delay-5 { transition-delay:0.5s; }

    /* Layout */
    .container { max-width:1140px; margin:0 auto; padding:0 24px; }
    .container-narrow { max-width:820px; margin:0 auto; padding:0 24px; }

    /* Nav */
    nav { position:sticky; top:0; z-index:100; background:rgba(253,246,238,0.92); backdrop-filter:blur(16px); border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-light); }
    .nav-inner { max-width:1140px; margin:0 auto; padding:16px 24px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; }
    .nav-logo { font-family:var(--font-display); font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:700; color:var(--navy); text-decoration:none; }
    .nav-logo span { color:var(--orange); }
    .nav-links { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:32px; }
    .nav-links a { font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:600; color:var(--text-secondary); text-decoration:none; transition:color 0.2s; }
    .nav-links a:hover { color:var(--orange); }
    .nav-cta { background:var(--orange)!important; color:white!important; padding:10px 24px!important; border-radius:6px; font-weight:600!important; transition:all 0.2s!important; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(232,121,43,0.25); }
    .nav-cta:hover { background:var(--amber)!important; transform:translateY(-1px); box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(232,121,43,0.35)!important; }
    .nav-mobile { display:none; background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; color:var(--navy); }
    .mobile-menu { display:none; flex-direction:column; gap:8px; padding:16px 24px 24px; background:var(--cream); border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-light); }
    .mobile-menu a { display:block; padding:8px 0; font-size:0.95rem; font-weight:600; color:var(--text-secondary); text-decoration:none; }
    .mobile-menu .nav-cta { display:inline-block; text-align:center; margin-top:8px; }

    /* Buttons */
    .btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; background:var(--orange); color:white; padding:16px 32px; border-radius:8px; font-family:var(--font-body); font-size:1rem; font-weight:700; text-decoration:none; transition:all 0.25s var(--ease-out-expo); box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(232,121,43,0.3); border:none; cursor:pointer; }
    .btn-primary:hover { background:var(--amber); transform:translateY(-2px); box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(232,121,43,0.4); }
    .btn-secondary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; background:transparent; color:var(--navy); padding:16px 32px; border-radius:8px; font-family:var(--font-body); font-size:1rem; font-weight:700; text-decoration:none; border:2px solid var(--border); transition:all 0.25s var(--ease-out-expo); cursor:pointer; }
    .btn-secondary:hover { border-color:var(--orange); color:var(--orange); transform:translateY(-2px); }

    /* Hero */
    .hero { position:relative; padding:100px 0 80px; background:var(--cream); overflow:hidden; }
    .hero::before { content:''; position:absolute; top:-200px; right:-150px; width:600px; height:600px; border-radius:50%; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(232,121,43,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%); pointer-events:none; }
    .hero::after { content:''; position:absolute; bottom:-150px; left:-100px; width:500px; height:500px; border-radius:50%; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(26,177,210,0.06) 0%, transparent 70%); pointer-events:none; }
    .hero-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 420px; gap:64px; align-items:center; position:relative; z-index:2; }
    .hero-badge { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; background:white; padding:6px 16px; border-radius:100px; font-size:0.8rem; font-weight:600; color:var(--orange); margin-bottom:24px; box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); animation:fadeIn 0.6s var(--ease-out-expo) both; }
    .hero-badge::before { content:''; width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--orange); animation:pulseGlow 2s infinite; }
    .hero h1 { font-size:3.2rem; font-weight:800; line-height:1.08; margin-bottom:24px; animation:fadeUp 0.8s var(--ease-out-expo) 0.1s both; }
    .hero h1 em { font-style:italic; color:var(--orange); font-weight:600; }
    .hero-sub { font-size:1.25rem; color:var(--text-body); max-width:520px; margin-bottom:12px; animation:fadeUp 0.8s var(--ease-out-expo) 0.2s both; }
    .hero-details { font-size:0.95rem; color:var(--text-secondary); max-width:520px; margin-bottom:36px; animation:fadeUp 0.8s var(--ease-out-expo) 0.25s both; line-height:1.6; }
    .hero-details strong { color:var(--navy); }
    .hero-ctas { display:flex; gap:16px; flex-wrap:wrap; animation:fadeUp 0.8s var(--ease-out-expo) 0.35s both; }

    /* App Grid Visual */
    .hero-visual { position:relative; z-index:2; animation:fadeIn 1.2s var(--ease-out-expo) 0.4s both; }
    .app-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3, 1fr); gap:12px; max-width:320px; margin:0 auto; }
    .app-tile { background:white; border-radius:16px; padding:20px 16px; text-align:center; box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); border:1px solid var(--border-light); transition:all 0.3s var(--ease-out-expo); position:relative; }
    .app-tile:hover { transform:translateY(-4px); box-shadow:0 12px 36px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); }
    .app-tile-icon { font-size:2rem; margin-bottom:6px; }
    .app-tile-name { font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:var(--navy); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; }
    .app-tile .ai-badge { position:absolute; top:-6px; right:-6px; background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--g-blue), var(--g-red), var(--g-yellow), var(--g-green)); background-size:200% 200%; animation:shimmer 3s infinite linear; width:22px; height:22px; border-radius:6px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:0.55rem; color:white; font-weight:800; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); }
    .app-tile.center-tile { grid-column:1/-1; max-width:200px; justify-self:center; background:linear-gradient(145deg, var(--navy), var(--navy-mid)); color:white; border:none; }
    .app-tile.center-tile .app-tile-name { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8); }
    .app-tile.center-tile .app-tile-icon { filter:grayscale(0); }

    /* Problem */
    .problem { padding:100px 0; background:var(--warm-white); }
    .problem h2 { font-size:2.75rem; font-weight:800; text-align:center; margin-bottom:16px; }
    .problem h2 em { font-style:italic; color:var(--orange); font-weight:600; }
    .problem-sub { text-align:center; font-size:1.15rem; color:var(--text-secondary); max-width:640px; margin:0 auto 64px; }
    .stat-bar { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3, 1fr); gap:24px; max-width:800px; margin:0 auto 48px; }
    .stat-card { background:var(--cream); border-radius:16px; padding:32px 24px; text-align:center; border:1px solid var(--border-light); }
    .stat-value { font-family:var(--font-display); font-size:2.5rem; font-weight:800; color:var(--orange); line-height:1; margin-bottom:4px; }
    .stat-label { font-size:0.85rem; color:var(--text-secondary); }
    .pain-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(2, 1fr); gap:16px; max-width:800px; margin:0 auto; }
    .pain-card { background:white; border-radius:12px; padding:24px; border:1px solid var(--border-light); display:flex; gap:16px; align-items:start; transition:all 0.3s var(--ease-out-expo); }
    .pain-card:hover { transform:translateY(-2px); box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); }
    .pain-icon { font-size:1.5rem; flex-shrink:0; margin-top:2px; }
    .pain-text { font-size:0.95rem; }
    .pain-text strong { display:block; color:var(--navy); margin-bottom:4px; }

    /* Curriculum */
    .curriculum { padding:100px 0; background:var(--cream); }
    .curriculum h2 { font-size:2.75rem; font-weight:800; text-align:center; margin-bottom:16px; }
    .curriculum-sub { text-align:center; font-size:1.1rem; color:var(--text-secondary); max-width:580px; margin:0 auto 64px; }
    .week-cards { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(2, 1fr); gap:24px; max-width:960px; margin:0 auto; }
    .week-card { background:white; border-radius:16px; padding:32px; border:1px solid var(--border-light); transition:all 0.3s var(--ease-out-expo); position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
    .week-card::before { content:''; position:absolute; top:0; left:0; right:0; height:3px; }
    .week-card:nth-child(1)::before { background:var(--g-blue); }
    .week-card:nth-child(2)::before { background:var(--g-red); }
    .week-card:nth-child(3)::before { background:var(--g-yellow); }
    .week-card:nth-child(4)::before { background:var(--g-green); }
    .week-card:hover { transform:translateY(-4px); box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); }
    .week-num { font-family:var(--font-body); font-size:0.8rem; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.1em; margin-bottom:8px; }
    .week-card:nth-child(1) .week-num { color:var(--g-blue); }
    .week-card:nth-child(2) .week-num { color:var(--g-red); }
    .week-card:nth-child(3) .week-num { color:var(--g-yellow); }
    .week-card:nth-child(4) .week-num { color:var(--g-green); }
    .week-title { font-family:var(--font-display); font-size:1.35rem; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:12px; }
    .week-apps { display:flex; gap:6px; margin-bottom:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
    .week-app-tag { background:var(--cream); border:1px solid var(--border-light); border-radius:100px; padding:3px 10px; font-size:0.72rem; font-weight:600; color:var(--navy); }
    .week-desc { font-size:0.95rem; color:var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom:16px; line-height:1.7; }
    .week-deliverable { background:var(--cream); border-radius:8px; padding:12px 16px; font-size:0.85rem; }
    .week-deliverable strong { color:var(--navy); font-weight:700; }
    .week-deliverable span { color:var(--text-secondary); }

    /* What You Get */
    .includes { padding:100px 0; background:var(--warm-white); }
    .includes h2 { font-size:2.75rem; font-weight:800; text-align:center; margin-bottom:16px; }
    .includes-sub { text-align:center; font-size:1.1rem; color:var(--text-secondary); max-width:560px; margin:0 auto 56px; }
    .includes-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3, 1fr); gap:24px; max-width:960px; margin:0 auto; }
    .include-card { background:var(--cream); border-radius:16px; padding:32px 28px; border:1px solid var(--border-light); text-align:center; transition:all 0.3s var(--ease-out-expo); }
    .include-card:hover { transform:translateY(-4px); box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); }
    .include-icon { font-size:2.2rem; margin-bottom:16px; }
    .include-title { font-family:var(--font-display); font-size:1.15rem; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:8px; }
    .include-desc { font-size:0.9rem; color:var(--text-secondary); line-height:1.7; }

    /* Who Is This For */
    .audience { padding:100px 0; background:var(--cream); }
    .audience h2 { font-size:2.75rem; font-weight:800; text-align:center; margin-bottom:16px; }
    .audience-sub { text-align:center; font-size:1.1rem; color:var(--text-secondary); max-width:600px; margin:0 auto 56px; }
    .persona-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3, 1fr); gap:20px; max-width:960px; margin:0 auto; }
    .persona-card { background:white; border-radius:16px; padding:28px 24px; border:1px solid var(--border-light); transition:all 0.3s var(--ease-out-expo); position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
    .persona-card::before { content:''; position:absolute; top:0; left:0; right:0; height:3px; background:linear-gradient(90deg, var(--g-blue), var(--g-red), var(--g-yellow), var(--g-green)); background-size:200%; opacity:0; transition:opacity 0.3s; }
    .persona-card:hover { transform:translateY(-4px); box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); }
    .persona-card:hover::before { opacity:1; }
    .persona-emoji { font-size:2rem; margin-bottom:12px; }
    .persona-title { font-family:var(--font-display); font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:8px; }
    .persona-desc { font-size:0.88rem; color:var(--text-secondary); line-height:1.7; }

    /* Instructors */
    .instructors { padding:80px 0; background:var(--navy); position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
    .instructors::before { content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 50%, rgba(232,121,43,0.08) 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 50%, rgba(26,177,210,0.06) 0%, transparent 50%); pointer-events:none; }
    .instructors-inner { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:48px; position:relative; z-index:2; max-width:820px; margin:0 auto; }
    .instructors .section-label { color:var(--orange-light); }
    .instructor-card { text-align:center; }
    .instructor-name { font-family:var(--font-display); font-size:1.5rem; font-weight:700; color:white; margin-bottom:4px; }
    .instructor-role { font-size:0.9rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); margin-bottom:16px; }
    .instructor-bio { font-size:0.9rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7); line-height:1.7; }

    /* Pricing */
    .pricing { padding:100px 0; background:var(--warm-white); }
    .pricing h2 { font-size:2.75rem; font-weight:800; text-align:center; margin-bottom:16px; }
    .pricing-sub { text-align:center; font-size:1.1rem; color:var(--text-secondary); max-width:560px; margin:0 auto 56px; }
    .pricing-card { max-width:480px; margin:0 auto; border-radius:20px; padding:3px; background:linear-gradient(145deg, var(--g-blue), var(--g-red), var(--g-yellow), var(--g-green)); background-size:200% 200%; animation:shimmer 6s infinite linear; }
    .pricing-card-inner { background:white; border-radius:18px; padding:48px 40px; text-align:center; }
    .pricing-amount { font-family:var(--font-display); font-size:3.5rem; font-weight:800; color:var(--navy); line-height:1; margin-bottom:4px; }
    .pricing-per { font-size:0.95rem; color:var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom:32px; }
    .pricing-features { list-style:none; text-align:left; margin-bottom:36px; }
    .pricing-features li { padding:10px 0; font-size:0.95rem; color:var(--text-body); border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-light); display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:10px; }
    .pricing-features li:last-child { border:none; }
    .pricing-features li::before { content:'✓'; color:var(--g-green); font-weight:700; flex-shrink:0; }
    .pricing-btn { width:100%; }
    .pricing-note { text-align:center; font-size:0.85rem; color:var(--text-muted); margin-top:20px; max-width:480px; margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto; }

    /* FAQ */
    .faq { padding:100px 0; background:var(--cream); }
    .faq h2 { font-size:2.75rem; font-weight:800; text-align:center; margin-bottom:48px; }
    .faq-list { max-width:720px; margin:0 auto; }
    .faq-item { border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); }
    .faq-item summary { padding:20px 0; font-size:1.05rem; font-weight:700; color:var(--navy); cursor:pointer; list-style:none; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; }
    .faq-item summary::after { content:'+'; font-size:1.4rem; color:var(--text-muted); transition:transform 0.3s; }
    .faq-item[open] summary::after { content:'−'; }
    .faq-item p { padding:0 0 20px; font-size:0.95rem; color:var(--text-secondary); line-height:1.8; }

    /* CTA */
    .final-cta { padding:100px 0; background:var(--navy); text-align:center; position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
    .final-cta::before { content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 0%, rgba(232,121,43,0.12) 0%, transparent 60%); pointer-events:none; }
    .final-cta h2 { font-size:2.75rem; font-weight:800; color:white; margin-bottom:16px; position:relative; z-index:2; }
    .final-cta h2 em { font-style:italic; color:var(--orange-light); font-weight:600; }
    .final-cta-sub { font-size:1.15rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65); margin-bottom:40px; max-width:520px; margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto; position:relative; z-index:2; }
    .final-cta .btn-primary { position:relative; z-index:2; }

    /* Footer */
    footer { padding:40px 0; background:var(--navy-deep); text-align:center; }
    footer p { font-size:0.85rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35); }
    footer a { color:var(--cyan-muted); text-decoration:none; }

    /* Mobile */
    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      .hero { padding:64px 0 60px; }
      .hero-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:48px; }
      .hero h1 { font-size:2.2rem; }
      .hero-visual { order:-1; }
      .app-grid { max-width:260px; gap:10px; }
      .stat-bar { grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:12px; }
      .pain-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
      .week-cards { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
      .includes-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
      .persona-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
      .instructors-inner { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
      .pricing-card-inner { padding:36px 24px; }
      h2 { font-size:2rem!important; }
      .nav-links { display:none; }
      .nav-mobile { display:block; }
      .mobile-menu.open { display:flex; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- Navigation -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <a href="https://mtm.now" class="nav-logo">MTM <span>Together</span></a>
    <div class="nav-links">
      <a href="#curriculum">Curriculum</a>
      <a href="#pricing">Pricing</a>
      <a href="#faq">FAQ</a>
      <a href="#register" class="nav-cta">Register Now</a>
    </div>
    <button class="nav-mobile" onclick="document.querySelector('.mobile-menu').classList.toggle('open')" aria-label="Toggle menu">
      <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 12h18M3 6h18M3 18h18"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>
  <div class="mobile-menu">
    <a href="#curriculum">Curriculum</a>
    <a href="#pricing">Pricing</a>
    <a href="#faq">FAQ</a>
    <a href="#register" class="nav-cta">Register Now</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- Hero -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="hero-grid">
      <div class="hero-content">
        <div class="hero-badge">MTM Together Accelerator — 4 Weeks</div>
        <h1>Google's <em>AI Toolkit</em><br>for Nonprofits</h1>
        <p class="hero-sub">Gemini. Gems. NotebookLM. AI Studio. Google built an entire AI ecosystem — and most nonprofits don't know half of it exists. This course teaches you all of it.</p>
        <p class="hero-details">
          <strong>4 Thursdays starting April 23</strong> · 2:00 PM Eastern · 60 minutes<br>
          Office hours every Tuesday at 4:30 PM · MTM Together community access
        </p>
        <div class="hero-ctas">
          <a href="#register" class="btn-primary">Register Now →</a>
          <a href="#curriculum" class="btn-secondary">See the Curriculum</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-visual">
        <div class="app-grid">
          <div class="app-tile">
            <div class="ai-badge">AI</div>
            <div class="app-tile-icon">✨</div>
            <div class="app-tile-name">Gemini</div>
          </div>
          <div class="app-tile">
            <div class="ai-badge">AI</div>
            <div class="app-tile-icon">💎</div>
            <div class="app-tile-name">Gems</div>
          </div>
          <div class="app-tile">
            <div class="ai-badge">AI</div>
            <div class="app-tile-icon">📓</div>
            <div class="app-tile-name">NotebookLM</div>
          </div>
          <div class="app-tile">
            <div class="ai-badge">AI</div>
            <div class="app-tile-icon">🧪</div>
            <div class="app-tile-name">AI Studio</div>
          </div>
          <div class="app-tile">
            <div class="ai-badge">AI</div>
            <div class="app-tile-icon">🎥</div>
            <div class="app-tile-name">Vids</div>
          </div>
          <div class="app-tile">
            <div class="ai-badge">AI</div>
            <div class="app-tile-icon">📱</div>
            <div class="app-tile-name">AppSheet</div>
          </div>
          <div class="app-tile center-tile">
            <div class="app-tile-icon">🔗</div>
            <div class="app-tile-name">Workspace</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- Problem -->
<section class="problem">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-label reveal">The Opportunity</p>
    <h2 class="reveal reveal-delay-1">Google built an AI ecosystem.<br><em>Nobody told you.</em></h2>
    <p class="problem-sub reveal reveal-delay-2">It's not just "Gemini in your Docs." Google has quietly released an entire suite of AI tools — custom agents, research assistants, app builders, video creators — and most nonprofit teams are using maybe 5% of it.</p>

    <div class="stat-bar reveal reveal-delay-3">
      <div class="stat-card">
        <p class="stat-value">6+</p>
        <p class="stat-label">AI tools in the Google ecosystem</p>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-card">
        <p class="stat-value">70%+</p>
        <p class="stat-label">of nonprofits already on Google</p>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-card">
        <p class="stat-value">Most</p>
        <p class="stat-label">are free or included in your plan</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="pain-grid">
      <div class="pain-card reveal">
        <div class="pain-icon">✨</div>
        <div class="pain-text"><strong>Gemini — across every app</strong>AI writing, analysis, and summarization built into Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Slides, and Meet. The foundation.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pain-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <div class="pain-icon">💎</div>
        <div class="pain-text"><strong>Gems — your custom AI experts</strong>Build specialized AI personas for your org: a grant writer, a data analyst, a comms editor. They remember your context.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pain-card reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="pain-icon">📓</div>
        <div class="pain-text"><strong>NotebookLM — your AI research partner</strong>Upload board docs, grant guidelines, program data. Ask questions. Get answers with citations. Generate briefings and audio overviews.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pain-card reveal reveal-delay-3">
        <div class="pain-icon">🧪</div>
        <div class="pain-text"><strong>AI Studio, Vids & AppSheet</strong>Build custom AI prompts, create video content, and prototype no-code apps — all connected to your Workspace data.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Curriculum -->
<section class="curriculum" id="curriculum">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-label reveal">The 4-Week Arc</p>
    <h2 class="reveal reveal-delay-1">The full Google AI stack, in four weeks</h2>
    <p class="curriculum-sub reveal reveal-delay-2">Each session is 60 minutes — half teaching, half hands-on. You leave every week with something that works in your actual job.</p>

    <div class="week-cards">
      <div class="week-card reveal">
        <p class="week-num">Week 1 · April 23</p>
        <h3 class="week-title">Gemini Fundamentals</h3>
        <div class="week-apps">
          <span class="week-app-tag">Gemini</span>
          <span class="week-app-tag">Gmail</span>
          <span class="week-app-tag">Docs</span>
          <span class="week-app-tag">Sheets</span>
          <span class="week-app-tag">Slides</span>
        </div>
        <p class="week-desc">The AI already in every Google app. Draft emails, generate reports, analyze data, build presentations — all from the tools you already use every day. Understand what's available at your license tier and how to get the most from it.</p>
        <div class="week-deliverable"><strong>You leave with:</strong> <span>Gemini working across your actual Workspace — not a demo, your real tools</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="week-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <p class="week-num">Week 2 · April 30</p>
        <h3 class="week-title">Gems & NotebookLM</h3>
        <div class="week-apps">
          <span class="week-app-tag">Gems</span>
          <span class="week-app-tag">NotebookLM</span>
        </div>
        <p class="week-desc">Build custom AI experts for your organization — a grant writer Gem, a comms editor Gem, a data analyst Gem. Then use NotebookLM to turn your board packets, grant guidelines, and program docs into an AI research assistant that cites its sources.</p>
        <div class="week-deliverable"><strong>You leave with:</strong> <span>2 custom Gems built for your role + a NotebookLM notebook loaded with your org's documents</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="week-card reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <p class="week-num">Week 3 · May 7</p>
        <h3 class="week-title">AI Studio & Advanced Tools</h3>
        <div class="week-apps">
          <span class="week-app-tag">AI Studio</span>
          <span class="week-app-tag">Vids</span>
          <span class="week-app-tag">AppSheet</span>
          <span class="week-app-tag">Meet</span>
        </div>
        <p class="week-desc">Go beyond the basics. Use Google AI Studio to build and test custom prompts. Create video content with Vids. Prototype a no-code app with AppSheet. Set up automated meeting notes in Meet. See how the pieces connect.</p>
        <div class="week-deliverable"><strong>You leave with:</strong> <span>A tested custom prompt in AI Studio + an automated meeting workflow</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="week-card reveal reveal-delay-3">
        <p class="week-num">Week 4 · May 14</p>
        <h3 class="week-title">Your Organization's AI Playbook</h3>
        <div class="week-apps">
          <span class="week-app-tag">Workflows</span>
          <span class="week-app-tag">Governance</span>
          <span class="week-app-tag">90-Day Plan</span>
        </div>
        <p class="week-desc">Connect all the tools into workflows that save real hours. Draft AI use guidelines for your team. Build a 90-day plan for rolling Google AI out across your organization — who gets what, in what order, with what guardrails.</p>
        <div class="week-deliverable"><strong>You leave with:</strong> <span>3 documented AI workflows + a 90-day organizational rollout plan</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- What You Get -->
<section class="includes">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-label reveal">What's Included</p>
    <h2 class="reveal reveal-delay-1">Everything you need</h2>
    <p class="includes-sub reveal reveal-delay-2">This isn't a webinar you'll forget by Friday. It's a structured program with real support.</p>

    <div class="includes-grid">
      <div class="include-card reveal">
        <div class="include-icon">🎯</div>
        <h3 class="include-title">4 Live Sessions</h3>
        <p class="include-desc">Thursdays at 2 PM ET, 60 minutes each. Half teaching, half hands-on in your actual Workspace. Recordings available.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="include-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <div class="include-icon">🗓️</div>
        <h3 class="include-title">Weekly Office Hours</h3>
        <p class="include-desc">Tuesdays at 4:30 PM ET. Bring questions, troubleshoot features, share wins. Informal and practical.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="include-card reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="include-icon">👥</div>
        <h3 class="include-title">MTM Together Community</h3>
        <p class="include-desc">Access to our Circle community of nonprofit professionals exploring AI. Peer support, shared templates, ongoing learning.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="include-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <div class="include-icon">📋</div>
        <h3 class="include-title">Feature Cheat Sheets</h3>
        <p class="include-desc">Printable guides for every Google app — what's available, how to access it, and when to use it. Keep at your desk.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="include-card reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="include-icon">📈</div>
        <h3 class="include-title">30/60/90 Check-ins</h3>
        <p class="include-desc">The learning doesn't stop at week 4. We check in to see what's sticking and what needs adjustment.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="include-card reveal reveal-delay-3">
        <div class="include-icon">🔐</div>
        <h3 class="include-title">AI Policy Starter Kit</h3>
        <p class="include-desc">Templates for organizational AI guidelines specific to Google Workspace. Covers data handling, acceptable use, and staff training.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Who Is This For -->
<section class="audience">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-label reveal">Who This Is For</p>
    <h2 class="reveal reveal-delay-1">If your org uses Google, this is for you</h2>
    <p class="audience-sub reveal reveal-delay-2">You don't need to be technical. You need to use Google Workspace and want to do it better.</p>

    <div class="persona-grid">
      <div class="persona-card reveal">
        <div class="persona-emoji">📝</div>
        <h3 class="persona-title">The Report Writer</h3>
        <p class="persona-desc">Grant reports, board memos, program updates — you live in Docs and Gmail. You'd love to draft faster without sacrificing quality.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="persona-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <div class="persona-emoji">📊</div>
        <h3 class="persona-title">The Spreadsheet Wrangler</h3>
        <p class="persona-desc">You manage budgets, track outcomes, and wrestle with formulas. You know there's a better way but haven't had time to figure it out.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="persona-card reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="persona-emoji">🎯</div>
        <h3 class="persona-title">The Team Lead</h3>
        <p class="persona-desc">Your team already uses Google Workspace. You want everyone to be more productive — without buying new tools or hiring consultants.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Instructors -->
<section class="instructors">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-label reveal" style="text-align:center;">Your Instructors</p>
    <div class="instructors-inner">
      <div class="instructor-card reveal">
        <h3 class="instructor-name">Joshua Peskay</h3>
        <p class="instructor-role">Co-Founder, Meet the Moment</p>
        <p class="instructor-bio">30+ years in nonprofit technology. CISSP & CISM certified. Co-author of the cybersecurity chapter in <em>AI for Nonprofits</em>. Has trained 240+ organizations in AI adoption with assessment scores above 90%.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="instructor-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <h3 class="instructor-name">Kim Snyder</h3>
        <p class="instructor-role">Co-Founder, Meet the Moment</p>
        <p class="instructor-bio">Data privacy expert (PMP, CIPP/US). Former nonprofit IT executive. Specializes in making AI practical and accessible for frontline nonprofit staff. Cybersecurity Task Force, Westchester County.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Pricing -->
<section class="pricing" id="pricing">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-label reveal">Investment</p>
    <h2 class="reveal reveal-delay-1">One price. Everything included.</h2>
    <p class="pricing-sub reveal reveal-delay-2">No upsells, no premium tiers. Every participant gets the full experience.</p>

    <div class="pricing-card reveal reveal-delay-3">
      <div class="pricing-card-inner">
        <p class="pricing-amount">$225</p>
        <p class="pricing-per">per person</p>
        <ul class="pricing-features">
          <li>4 live sessions (Thursdays, 2 PM ET)</li>
          <li>4 weeks of office hours (Tuesdays, 4:30 PM ET)</li>
          <li>MTM Together community access</li>
          <li>Google AI feature cheat sheets</li>
          <li>Session recordings</li>
          <li>30/60/90-day check-ins</li>
          <li>AI policy starter kit for Google Workspace</li>
        </ul>
        <a href="#register" class="btn-primary pricing-btn" id="register">Register Now →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <p class="pricing-note reveal reveal-delay-4">Enrolling 3+ people? Contact us at <a href="mailto:joshua@mtm.now" style="color:var(--orange);">joshua@mtm.now</a> for group pricing.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FAQ -->
<section class="faq" id="faq">
  <div class="container">
    <h2 class="reveal">Questions</h2>
    <div class="faq-list">
      <details class="faq-item reveal">
        <summary>Does this work with Google Workspace for Nonprofits (the free tier)?</summary>
        <p>Yes! Many Gemini features are available across all tiers, and we'll clearly show which features are available at your license level. Some advanced features require Gemini for Workspace add-on, and we'll explain the costs and whether it's worth it for your organization.</p>
      </details>
      <details class="faq-item reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <summary>We use Microsoft 365, not Google. Is this course for us?</summary>
        <p>This course is specifically designed for Google Workspace users. If your organization uses Microsoft 365, keep an eye on our upcoming accelerators — or contact us about a custom engagement. The principles transfer, but the hands-on exercises are Google-specific.</p>
      </details>
      <details class="faq-item reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <summary>Will I need admin access to my organization's Google Workspace?</summary>
        <p>No. Everything we cover works from a regular user account. If your admin has disabled certain AI features, we'll show you how to have that conversation with your IT team — including a template request email.</p>
      </details>
      <details class="faq-item reveal reveal-delay-3">
        <summary>What about data privacy? Is it safe to use Gemini with sensitive nonprofit data?</summary>
        <p>Great question — and one we take very seriously. We cover data handling and privacy in every session, and Week 4 specifically addresses governance. For Business and Enterprise plans, Google does not use your data to train its models. We'll help you understand exactly what happens with your data at your tier.</p>
      </details>
      <details class="faq-item reveal">
        <summary>What if I miss a session?</summary>
        <p>All sessions are recorded and available within 24 hours. You also have weekly office hours to catch up. That said, the live sessions are where the hands-on learning happens — we encourage attending live when possible.</p>
      </details>
      <details class="faq-item reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <summary>What's the COMPAS framework?</summary>
        <p>COMPAS is MTM's methodology for responsible AI adoption: Context, Objective, Method, Performance, Assessment, Sharing. It ensures every AI initiative starts with understanding your organization and ends with knowledge transfer. The curriculum is built on COMPAS principles — you won't just learn features, you'll learn how to adopt them sustainably.</p>
      </details>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Final CTA -->
<section class="final-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <h2 class="reveal">You already have the tools.<br><em>Now learn to use them.</em></h2>
    <p class="final-cta-sub reveal reveal-delay-1">In four weeks, you'll save hours every week with AI features that are already in your browser — waiting for you to turn them on.</p>
    <a href="#register" class="btn-primary reveal reveal-delay-2">Register for $225 →</a>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Footer -->
<footer>
  <div class="container">
    <p>Meet the Moment · <a href="https://mtm.now">mtm.now</a> · An MTM Together Accelerator</p>
    <p style="margin-top:8px;">Built with care by Joshua Peskay & Kim Snyder</p>
  </div>
</footer>

<!-- Scroll reveal -->
<script>
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('visible'); } });
  }, { threshold: 0.1, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });
  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
</script>

</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>The Google AI Toolkit | Gemini, Gems, NotebookLM & More — MTM Together Accelerator</title>
  <meta name="description" content="Gemini, Gems, NotebookLM, AI Studio — Google built an entire AI ecosystem and most nonprofits don't know it exists. A 4-week hands-on accelerator from Meet the Moment.">

  <meta property="og:title" content="The Google AI Toolkit — Gemini, Gems, NotebookLM & More">
  <meta property="og:description" content="Google built an entire AI ecosystem and most nonprofits don't know it exists. A 4-week hands-on accelerator from Meet the Moment.">
  <meta property="og:type" content="website">

  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;0,800;1,400;1,600&family=Source+Sans+3:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

  <style>
    :root {
      --orange: #e8792b;
      --orange-light: #f5a623;
      --amber: #d4740e;
      --navy: #1a2744;
      --navy-deep: #0f1a2e;
      --navy-mid: #2a3a5c;
      --cyan: #1ab1d2;
      --cyan-muted: #7ec8d9;
      --cream: #fdf6ee;
      --cream-dark: #f5ead8;
      --warm-white: #fefcf9;
      --text-primary: #1a2744;
      --text-body: #3d4a5c;
      --text-secondary: #6b7a8d;
      --text-muted: #94a3b8;
      --border: #e8ddd0;
      --border-light: #f0e8dc;
      /* Google colors */
      --g-blue: #4285f4;
      --g-red: #ea4335;
      --g-yellow: #fbbc05;
      --g-green: #34a853;

      --font-display: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
      --font-body: 'Source Sans 3', 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif;
      --ease-out-expo: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
    }

    *, *::before, *::after { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
    html { scroll-behavior:smooth; }
    body { font-family:var(--font-body); color:var(--text-body); line-height:1.7; background:var(--warm-white); -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased; overflow-x:hidden; }
    h1, h2, h3, h4 { font-family:var(--font-display); color:var(--navy); line-height:1.2; }
    .section-label { font-family:var(--font-body); font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.15em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--orange); margin-bottom:0.75rem; }

    /* Animations */
    @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(32px); } to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); } }
    @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity:0; } to { opacity:1; } }
    @keyframes pulseGlow { 0%,100% { box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(232,121,43,0.3); } 50% { box-shadow:0 0 0 12px rgba(232,121,43,0); } }
    @keyframes shimmer { 0% { background-position:-200% 0; } 100% { background-position:200% 0; } }

    .reveal { opacity:0; transform:translateY(32px); transition:opacity 0.8s var(--ease-out-expo), transform 0.8s var(--ease-out-expo); }
    .reveal.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
    .reveal-delay-1 { transition-delay:0.1s; }
    .reveal-delay-2 { transition-delay:0.2s; }
    .reveal-delay-3 { transition-delay:0.3s; }
    .reveal-delay-4 { transition-delay:0.4s; }
    .reveal-delay-5 { transition-delay:0.5s; }

    /* Layout */
    .container { max-width:1140px; margin:0 auto; padding:0 24px; }
    .container-narrow { max-width:820px; margin:0 auto; padding:0 24px; }

    /* Nav */
    nav { position:sticky; top:0; z-index:100; background:rgba(253,246,238,0.92); backdrop-filter:blur(16px); border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-light); }
    .nav-inner { max-width:1140px; margin:0 auto; padding:16px 24px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; }
    .nav-logo { font-family:var(--font-display); font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:700; color:var(--navy); text-decoration:none; }
    .nav-logo span { color:var(--orange); }
    .nav-links { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:32px; }
    .nav-links a { font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:600; color:var(--text-secondary); text-decoration:none; transition:color 0.2s; }
    .nav-links a:hover { color:var(--orange); }
    .nav-cta { background:var(--orange)!important; color:white!important; padding:10px 24px!important; border-radius:6px; font-weight:600!important; transition:all 0.2s!important; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(232,121,43,0.25); }
    .nav-cta:hover { background:var(--amber)!important; transform:translateY(-1px); box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(232,121,43,0.35)!important; }
    .nav-mobile { display:none; background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; color:var(--navy); }
    .mobile-menu { display:none; flex-direction:column; gap:8px; padding:16px 24px 24px; background:var(--cream); border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-light); }
    .mobile-menu a { display:block; padding:8px 0; font-size:0.95rem; font-weight:600; color:var(--text-secondary); text-decoration:none; }
    .mobile-menu .nav-cta { display:inline-block; text-align:center; margin-top:8px; }

    /* Buttons */
    .btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; background:var(--orange); color:white; padding:16px 32px; border-radius:8px; font-family:var(--font-body); font-size:1rem; font-weight:700; text-decoration:none; transition:all 0.25s var(--ease-out-expo); box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(232,121,43,0.3); border:none; cursor:pointer; }
    .btn-primary:hover { background:var(--amber); transform:translateY(-2px); box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(232,121,43,0.4); }
    .btn-secondary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; background:transparent; color:var(--navy); padding:16px 32px; border-radius:8px; font-family:var(--font-body); font-size:1rem; font-weight:700; text-decoration:none; border:2px solid var(--border); transition:all 0.25s var(--ease-out-expo); cursor:pointer; }
    .btn-secondary:hover { border-color:var(--orange); color:var(--orange); transform:translateY(-2px); }

    /* Hero */
    .hero { position:relative; padding:100px 0 80px; background:var(--cream); overflow:hidden; }
    .hero::before { content:''; position:absolute; top:-200px; right:-150px; width:600px; height:600px; border-radius:50%; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(232,121,43,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%); pointer-events:none; }
    .hero::after { content:''; position:absolute; bottom:-150px; left:-100px; width:500px; height:500px; border-radius:50%; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(26,177,210,0.06) 0%, transparent 70%); pointer-events:none; }
    .hero-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 420px; gap:64px; align-items:center; position:relative; z-index:2; }
    .hero-badge { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; background:white; padding:6px 16px; border-radius:100px; font-size:0.8rem; font-weight:600; color:var(--orange); margin-bottom:24px; box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); animation:fadeIn 0.6s var(--ease-out-expo) both; }
    .hero-badge::before { content:''; width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--orange); animation:pulseGlow 2s infinite; }
    .hero h1 { font-size:3.2rem; font-weight:800; line-height:1.08; margin-bottom:24px; animation:fadeUp 0.8s var(--ease-out-expo) 0.1s both; }
    .hero h1 em { font-style:italic; color:var(--orange); font-weight:600; }
    .hero-sub { font-size:1.25rem; color:var(--text-body); max-width:520px; margin-bottom:12px; animation:fadeUp 0.8s var(--ease-out-expo) 0.2s both; }
    .hero-details { font-size:0.95rem; color:var(--text-secondary); max-width:520px; margin-bottom:36px; animation:fadeUp 0.8s var(--ease-out-expo) 0.25s both; line-height:1.6; }
    .hero-details strong { color:var(--navy); }
    .hero-ctas { display:flex; gap:16px; flex-wrap:wrap; animation:fadeUp 0.8s var(--ease-out-expo) 0.35s both; }

    /* App Grid Visual */
    .hero-visual { position:relative; z-index:2; animation:fadeIn 1.2s var(--ease-out-expo) 0.4s both; }
    .app-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3, 1fr); gap:12px; max-width:320px; margin:0 auto; }
    .app-tile { background:white; border-radius:16px; padding:20px 16px; text-align:center; box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); border:1px solid var(--border-light); transition:all 0.3s var(--ease-out-expo); position:relative; }
    .app-tile:hover { transform:translateY(-4px); box-shadow:0 12px 36px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); }
    .app-tile-icon { font-size:2rem; margin-bottom:6px; }
    .app-tile-name { font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:var(--navy); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; }
    .app-tile .ai-badge { position:absolute; top:-6px; right:-6px; background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--g-blue), var(--g-red), var(--g-yellow), var(--g-green)); background-size:200% 200%; animation:shimmer 3s infinite linear; width:22px; height:22px; border-radius:6px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:0.55rem; color:white; font-weight:800; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); }
    .app-tile.center-tile { grid-column:1/-1; max-width:200px; justify-self:center; background:linear-gradient(145deg, var(--navy), var(--navy-mid)); color:white; border:none; }
    .app-tile.center-tile .app-tile-name { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8); }
    .app-tile.center-tile .app-tile-icon { filter:grayscale(0); }

    /* Problem */
    .problem { padding:100px 0; background:var(--warm-white); }
    .problem h2 { font-size:2.75rem; font-weight:800; text-align:center; margin-bottom:16px; }
    .problem h2 em { font-style:italic; color:var(--orange); font-weight:600; }
    .problem-sub { text-align:center; font-size:1.15rem; color:var(--text-secondary); max-width:640px; margin:0 auto 64px; }
    .stat-bar { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3, 1fr); gap:24px; max-width:800px; margin:0 auto 48px; }
    .stat-card { background:var(--cream); border-radius:16px; padding:32px 24px; text-align:center; border:1px solid var(--border-light); }
    .stat-value { font-family:var(--font-display); font-size:2.5rem; font-weight:800; color:var(--orange); line-height:1; margin-bottom:4px; }
    .stat-label { font-size:0.85rem; color:var(--text-secondary); }
    .pain-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(2, 1fr); gap:16px; max-width:800px; margin:0 auto; }
    .pain-card { background:white; border-radius:12px; padding:24px; border:1px solid var(--border-light); display:flex; gap:16px; align-items:start; transition:all 0.3s var(--ease-out-expo); }
    .pain-card:hover { transform:translateY(-2px); box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); }
    .pain-icon { font-size:1.5rem; flex-shrink:0; margin-top:2px; }
    .pain-text { font-size:0.95rem; }
    .pain-text strong { display:block; color:var(--navy); margin-bottom:4px; }

    /* Curriculum */
    .curriculum { padding:100px 0; background:var(--cream); }
    .curriculum h2 { font-size:2.75rem; font-weight:800; text-align:center; margin-bottom:16px; }
    .curriculum-sub { text-align:center; font-size:1.1rem; color:var(--text-secondary); max-width:580px; margin:0 auto 64px; }
    .week-cards { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(2, 1fr); gap:24px; max-width:960px; margin:0 auto; }
    .week-card { background:white; border-radius:16px; padding:32px; border:1px solid var(--border-light); transition:all 0.3s var(--ease-out-expo); position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
    .week-card::before { content:''; position:absolute; top:0; left:0; right:0; height:3px; }
    .week-card:nth-child(1)::before { background:var(--g-blue); }
    .week-card:nth-child(2)::before { background:var(--g-red); }
    .week-card:nth-child(3)::before { background:var(--g-yellow); }
    .week-card:nth-child(4)::before { background:var(--g-green); }
    .week-card:hover { transform:translateY(-4px); box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); }
    .week-num { font-family:var(--font-body); font-size:0.8rem; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.1em; margin-bottom:8px; }
    .week-card:nth-child(1) .week-num { color:var(--g-blue); }
    .week-card:nth-child(2) .week-num { color:var(--g-red); }
    .week-card:nth-child(3) .week-num { color:var(--g-yellow); }
    .week-card:nth-child(4) .week-num { color:var(--g-green); }
    .week-title { font-family:var(--font-display); font-size:1.35rem; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:12px; }
    .week-apps { display:flex; gap:6px; margin-bottom:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
    .week-app-tag { background:var(--cream); border:1px solid var(--border-light); border-radius:100px; padding:3px 10px; font-size:0.72rem; font-weight:600; color:var(--navy); }
    .week-desc { font-size:0.95rem; color:var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom:16px; line-height:1.7; }
    .week-deliverable { background:var(--cream); border-radius:8px; padding:12px 16px; font-size:0.85rem; }
    .week-deliverable strong { color:var(--navy); font-weight:700; }
    .week-deliverable span { color:var(--text-secondary); }

    /* What You Get */
    .includes { padding:100px 0; background:var(--warm-white); }
    .includes h2 { font-size:2.75rem; font-weight:800; text-align:center; margin-bottom:16px; }
    .includes-sub { text-align:center; font-size:1.1rem; color:var(--text-secondary); max-width:560px; margin:0 auto 56px; }
    .includes-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3, 1fr); gap:24px; max-width:960px; margin:0 auto; }
    .include-card { background:var(--cream); border-radius:16px; padding:32px 28px; border:1px solid var(--border-light); text-align:center; transition:all 0.3s var(--ease-out-expo); }
    .include-card:hover { transform:translateY(-4px); box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); }
    .include-icon { font-size:2.2rem; margin-bottom:16px; }
    .include-title { font-family:var(--font-display); font-size:1.15rem; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:8px; }
    .include-desc { font-size:0.9rem; color:var(--text-secondary); line-height:1.7; }

    /* Who Is This For */
    .audience { padding:100px 0; background:var(--cream); }
    .audience h2 { font-size:2.75rem; font-weight:800; text-align:center; margin-bottom:16px; }
    .audience-sub { text-align:center; font-size:1.1rem; color:var(--text-secondary); max-width:600px; margin:0 auto 56px; }
    .persona-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3, 1fr); gap:20px; max-width:960px; margin:0 auto; }
    .persona-card { background:white; border-radius:16px; padding:28px 24px; border:1px solid var(--border-light); transition:all 0.3s var(--ease-out-expo); position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
    .persona-card::before { content:''; position:absolute; top:0; left:0; right:0; height:3px; background:linear-gradient(90deg, var(--g-blue), var(--g-red), var(--g-yellow), var(--g-green)); background-size:200%; opacity:0; transition:opacity 0.3s; }
    .persona-card:hover { transform:translateY(-4px); box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); }
    .persona-card:hover::before { opacity:1; }
    .persona-emoji { font-size:2rem; margin-bottom:12px; }
    .persona-title { font-family:var(--font-display); font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:8px; }
    .persona-desc { font-size:0.88rem; color:var(--text-secondary); line-height:1.7; }

    /* Instructors */
    .instructors { padding:80px 0; background:var(--navy); position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
    .instructors::before { content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 50%, rgba(232,121,43,0.08) 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 50%, rgba(26,177,210,0.06) 0%, transparent 50%); pointer-events:none; }
    .instructors-inner { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:48px; position:relative; z-index:2; max-width:820px; margin:0 auto; }
    .instructors .section-label { color:var(--orange-light); }
    .instructor-card { text-align:center; }
    .instructor-name { font-family:var(--font-display); font-size:1.5rem; font-weight:700; color:white; margin-bottom:4px; }
    .instructor-role { font-size:0.9rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); margin-bottom:16px; }
    .instructor-bio { font-size:0.9rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7); line-height:1.7; }

    /* Pricing */
    .pricing { padding:100px 0; background:var(--warm-white); }
    .pricing h2 { font-size:2.75rem; font-weight:800; text-align:center; margin-bottom:16px; }
    .pricing-sub { text-align:center; font-size:1.1rem; color:var(--text-secondary); max-width:560px; margin:0 auto 56px; }
    .pricing-card { max-width:480px; margin:0 auto; border-radius:20px; padding:3px; background:linear-gradient(145deg, var(--g-blue), var(--g-red), var(--g-yellow), var(--g-green)); background-size:200% 200%; animation:shimmer 6s infinite linear; }
    .pricing-card-inner { background:white; border-radius:18px; padding:48px 40px; text-align:center; }
    .pricing-amount { font-family:var(--font-display); font-size:3.5rem; font-weight:800; color:var(--navy); line-height:1; margin-bottom:4px; }
    .pricing-per { font-size:0.95rem; color:var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom:32px; }
    .pricing-features { list-style:none; text-align:left; margin-bottom:36px; }
    .pricing-features li { padding:10px 0; font-size:0.95rem; color:var(--text-body); border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-light); display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:10px; }
    .pricing-features li:last-child { border:none; }
    .pricing-features li::before { content:'✓'; color:var(--g-green); font-weight:700; flex-shrink:0; }
    .pricing-btn { width:100%; }
    .pricing-note { text-align:center; font-size:0.85rem; color:var(--text-muted); margin-top:20px; max-width:480px; margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto; }

    /* FAQ */
    .faq { padding:100px 0; background:var(--cream); }
    .faq h2 { font-size:2.75rem; font-weight:800; text-align:center; margin-bottom:48px; }
    .faq-list { max-width:720px; margin:0 auto; }
    .faq-item { border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); }
    .faq-item summary { padding:20px 0; font-size:1.05rem; font-weight:700; color:var(--navy); cursor:pointer; list-style:none; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; }
    .faq-item summary::after { content:'+'; font-size:1.4rem; color:var(--text-muted); transition:transform 0.3s; }
    .faq-item[open] summary::after { content:'−'; }
    .faq-item p { padding:0 0 20px; font-size:0.95rem; color:var(--text-secondary); line-height:1.8; }

    /* CTA */
    .final-cta { padding:100px 0; background:var(--navy); text-align:center; position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
    .final-cta::before { content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 0%, rgba(232,121,43,0.12) 0%, transparent 60%); pointer-events:none; }
    .final-cta h2 { font-size:2.75rem; font-weight:800; color:white; margin-bottom:16px; position:relative; z-index:2; }
    .final-cta h2 em { font-style:italic; color:var(--orange-light); font-weight:600; }
    .final-cta-sub { font-size:1.15rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65); margin-bottom:40px; max-width:520px; margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto; position:relative; z-index:2; }
    .final-cta .btn-primary { position:relative; z-index:2; }

    /* Footer */
    footer { padding:40px 0; background:var(--navy-deep); text-align:center; }
    footer p { font-size:0.85rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35); }
    footer a { color:var(--cyan-muted); text-decoration:none; }

    /* Mobile */
    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      .hero { padding:64px 0 60px; }
      .hero-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:48px; }
      .hero h1 { font-size:2.2rem; }
      .hero-visual { order:-1; }
      .app-grid { max-width:260px; gap:10px; }
      .stat-bar { grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:12px; }
      .pain-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
      .week-cards { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
      .includes-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
      .persona-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
      .instructors-inner { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
      .pricing-card-inner { padding:36px 24px; }
      h2 { font-size:2rem!important; }
      .nav-links { display:none; }
      .nav-mobile { display:block; }
      .mobile-menu.open { display:flex; }
    }
  </style>
</head>

<!-- Problem -->
<section class="problem">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-label reveal">The Opportunity</p>
    <h2 class="reveal reveal-delay-1">Google built an AI ecosystem.<br><em>Nobody told you.</em></h2>
    <p class="problem-sub reveal reveal-delay-2">It's not just "Gemini in your Docs." Google has quietly released an entire suite of AI tools — custom agents, research assistants, app builders, video creators — and most nonprofit teams are using maybe 5% of it.</p>

    <div class="stat-bar reveal reveal-delay-3">
      <div class="stat-card">
        <p class="stat-value">6+</p>
        <p class="stat-label">AI tools in the Google ecosystem</p>
      </div>

        <p class="stat-value">70%+</p>
        <p class="stat-label">of nonprofits already on Google</p>
      </div>

      </div>
      <div class="pain-card reveal reveal-delay-1">

      </div>
      <div class="pain-card reveal reveal-delay-3">
        <div class="pain-icon">🧪</div>

<!-- Curriculum -->
<section class="curriculum" id="curriculum">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-label reveal">The 4-Week Arc</p>
    <h2 class="reveal reveal-delay-1">The full Google AI stack, in four weeks</h2>
    <p class="curriculum-sub reveal reveal-delay-2">Each session is 60 minutes — half teaching, half hands-on. You leave every week with something that works in your actual job.</p>

    <div class="week-cards">
      <div class="week-card reveal">
        <p class="week-num">Week 1 · April 23</p>
        <h3 class="week-title">Gemini Fundamentals</h3>
        <div class="week-apps">
          <span class="week-app-tag">Gemini</span>
          <span class="week-app-tag">Gmail</span>
          <span class="week-app-tag">Docs</span>
          <span class="week-app-tag">Sheets</span>
          <span class="week-app-tag">Slides</span>
        </div>
        <p class="week-desc">The AI already in every Google app. Draft emails, generate reports, analyze data, build presentations — all from the tools you already use every day. Understand what's available at your license tier and how to get the most from it.</p>
        <div class="week-deliverable"><strong>You leave with:</strong> <span>Gemini working across your actual Workspace — not a demo, your real tools</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="week-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <p class="week-num">Week 2 · April 30</p>
        <h3 class="week-title">Gems & NotebookLM</h3>
        <div class="week-apps">
          <span class="week-app-tag">Gems</span>
          <span class="week-app-tag">NotebookLM</span>
        </div>
        <p class="week-desc">Build custom AI experts for your organization — a grant writer Gem, a comms editor Gem, a data analyst Gem. Then use NotebookLM to turn your board packets, grant guidelines, and program docs into an AI research assistant that cites its sources.</p>
        <div class="week-deliverable"><strong>You leave with:</strong> <span>2 custom Gems built for your role + a NotebookLM notebook loaded with your org's documents</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="week-card reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <p class="week-num">Week 3 · May 7</p>
        <h3 class="week-title">AI Studio & Advanced Tools</h3>
        <div class="week-apps">
          <span class="week-app-tag">AI Studio</span>
          <span class="week-app-tag">Vids</span>
          <span class="week-app-tag">AppSheet</span>
          <span class="week-app-tag">Meet</span>
        </div>
        <p class="week-desc">Go beyond the basics. Use Google AI Studio to build and test custom prompts. Create video content with Vids. Prototype a no-code app with AppSheet. Set up automated meeting notes in Meet. See how the pieces connect.</p>
        <div class="week-deliverable"><strong>You leave with:</strong> <span>A tested custom prompt in AI Studio + an automated meeting workflow</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="week-card reveal reveal-delay-3">
        <p class="week-num">Week 4 · May 14</p>
        <h3 class="week-title">Your Organization's AI Playbook</h3>
        <div class="week-apps">
          <span class="week-app-tag">Workflows</span>
          <span class="week-app-tag">Governance</span>
          <span class="week-app-tag">90-Day Plan</span>
        </div>
        <p class="week-desc">Connect all the tools into workflows that save real hours. Draft AI use guidelines for your team. Build a 90-day plan for rolling Google AI out across your organization — who gets what, in what order, with what guardrails.</p>
        <div class="week-deliverable"><strong>You leave with:</strong> <span>3 documented AI workflows + a 90-day organizational rollout plan</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- What You Get -->
<section class="includes">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-label reveal">What's Included</p>
    <h2 class="reveal reveal-delay-1">Everything you need</h2>
    <p class="includes-sub reveal reveal-delay-2">This isn't a webinar you'll forget by Friday. It's a structured program with real support.</p>

    <div class="includes-grid">
      <div class="include-card reveal">
        <div class="include-icon">🎯</div>
        <h3 class="include-title">4 Live Sessions</h3>
        <p class="include-desc">Thursdays at 2 PM ET, 60 minutes each. Half teaching, half hands-on in your actual Workspace. Recordings available.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="include-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <div class="include-icon">🗓️</div>
        <h3 class="include-title">Weekly Office Hours</h3>
        <p class="include-desc">Tuesdays at 4:30 PM ET. Bring questions, troubleshoot features, share wins. Informal and practical.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="include-card reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="include-icon">👥</div>
        <h3 class="include-title">MTM Together Community</h3>
        <p class="include-desc">Access to our Circle community of nonprofit professionals exploring AI. Peer support, shared templates, ongoing learning.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="include-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <div class="include-icon">📋</div>
        <h3 class="include-title">Tool-by-Tool Guides</h3>
        <p class="include-desc">Printable guides for Gemini, Gems, NotebookLM, AI Studio, and more — what each does, how to access it, and when to use which.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="include-card reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="include-icon">📈</div>
        <h3 class="include-title">30/60/90 Check-ins</h3>
        <p class="include-desc">The learning doesn't stop at week 4. We check in to see what's sticking and what needs adjustment.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="include-card reveal reveal-delay-3">
        <div class="include-icon">🔐</div>
        <h3 class="include-title">AI Policy Starter Kit</h3>
        <p class="include-desc">Templates for organizational AI guidelines specific to Google Workspace. Covers data handling, acceptable use, and staff training.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Who Is This For -->
<section class="audience">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-label reveal">Who This Is For</p>
    <h2 class="reveal reveal-delay-1">If your org uses Google, this is for you</h2>
    <p class="audience-sub reveal reveal-delay-2">You don't need to be technical. You need to use Google Workspace and want to do it better.</p>

    <div class="persona-grid">
      <div class="persona-card reveal">
        <div class="persona-emoji">📝</div>
        <h3 class="persona-title">The Report Writer</h3>
        <p class="persona-desc">Grant reports, board memos, program updates — you live in Docs and Gmail. You'd love to draft faster without sacrificing quality.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="persona-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <div class="persona-emoji">📊</div>
        <h3 class="persona-title">The Spreadsheet Wrangler</h3>
        <p class="persona-desc">You manage budgets, track outcomes, and wrestle with formulas. You know there's a better way but haven't had time to figure it out.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="persona-card reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="persona-emoji">🎯</div>
        <h3 class="persona-title">The Team Lead</h3>
        <p class="persona-desc">Your team already uses Google Workspace. You want everyone to be more productive — without buying new tools or hiring consultants.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Instructors -->
<section class="instructors">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-label reveal" style="text-align:center;">Your Instructors</p>
    <div class="instructors-inner">
      <div class="instructor-card reveal">
        <h3 class="instructor-name">Joshua Peskay</h3>
        <p class="instructor-role">Co-Founder, Meet the Moment</p>
        <p class="instructor-bio">30+ years in nonprofit technology. CISSP & CISM certified. Co-author of the cybersecurity chapter in <em>AI for Nonprofits</em>. Has trained 240+ organizations in AI adoption with assessment scores above 90%.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="instructor-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <h3 class="instructor-name">Kim Snyder</h3>
        <p class="instructor-role">Co-Founder, Meet the Moment</p>
        <p class="instructor-bio">Data privacy expert (PMP, CIPP/US). Former nonprofit IT executive. Specializes in making AI practical and accessible for frontline nonprofit staff. Cybersecurity Task Force, Westchester County.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Pricing -->
<section class="pricing" id="pricing">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-label reveal">Investment</p>
    <h2 class="reveal reveal-delay-1">One price. Everything included.</h2>
    <p class="pricing-sub reveal reveal-delay-2">No upsells, no premium tiers. Every participant gets the full experience.</p>

    <div class="pricing-card reveal reveal-delay-3">
      <div class="pricing-card-inner">
        <p class="pricing-amount">$225</p>
        <p class="pricing-per">per person</p>
        <ul class="pricing-features">
          <li>4 live sessions (Thursdays, 2 PM ET)</li>
          <li>4 weeks of office hours (Tuesdays, 4:30 PM ET)</li>
          <li>MTM Together community access</li>
          <li>Google AI feature cheat sheets</li>
          <li>Session recordings</li>
          <li>30/60/90-day check-ins</li>
          <li>AI policy starter kit for Google Workspace</li>
        </ul>
        <a href="#register" class="btn-primary pricing-btn" id="register">Register Now →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <p class="pricing-note reveal reveal-delay-4">Enrolling 3+ people? Contact us at <a href="mailto:joshua@mtm.now" style="color:var(--orange);">joshua@mtm.now</a> for group pricing.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FAQ -->
<section class="faq" id="faq">
  <div class="container">
    <h2 class="reveal">Questions</h2>
    <div class="faq-list">
      <details class="faq-item reveal">
        <summary>Does this work with Google Workspace for Nonprofits (the free tier)?</summary>
        <p>Yes! Many Gemini features are available across all tiers, and we'll clearly show which features are available at your license level. Some advanced features require Gemini for Workspace add-on, and we'll explain the costs and whether it's worth it for your organization.</p>
      </details>
      <details class="faq-item reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <summary>We use Microsoft 365, not Google. Is this course for us?</summary>
        <p>This course is specifically designed for Google Workspace users. If your organization uses Microsoft 365, keep an eye on our upcoming accelerators — or contact us about a custom engagement. The principles transfer, but the hands-on exercises are Google-specific.</p>
      </details>
      <details class="faq-item reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <summary>Will I need admin access to my organization's Google Workspace?</summary>
        <p>No. Everything we cover works from a regular user account. If your admin has disabled certain AI features, we'll show you how to have that conversation with your IT team — including a template request email.</p>
      </details>
      <details class="faq-item reveal reveal-delay-3">
        <summary>What about data privacy? Is it safe to use Gemini with sensitive nonprofit data?</summary>
        <p>Great question — and one we take very seriously. We cover data handling and privacy in every session, and Week 4 specifically addresses governance. For Business and Enterprise plans, Google does not use your data to train its models. We'll help you understand exactly what happens with your data at your tier.</p>
      </details>
      <details class="faq-item reveal">
        <summary>What if I miss a session?</summary>
        <p>All sessions are recorded and available within 24 hours. You also have weekly office hours to catch up. That said, the live sessions are where the hands-on learning happens — we encourage attending live when possible.</p>
      </details>
      <details class="faq-item reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <summary>What's the COMPAS framework?</summary>
        <p>COMPAS is MTM's methodology for responsible AI adoption: Context, Objective, Method, Performance, Assessment, Sharing. It ensures every AI initiative starts with understanding your organization and ends with knowledge transfer. The curriculum is built on COMPAS principles — you won't just learn features, you'll learn how to adopt them sustainably.</p>
      </details>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Final CTA -->
<section class="final-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <h2 class="reveal">You already have the tools.<br><em>Now learn to use them.</em></h2>
    <p class="final-cta-sub reveal reveal-delay-1">In four weeks, you'll save hours every week with AI features that are already in your browser — waiting for you to turn them on.</p>
    <a href="#register" class="btn-primary reveal reveal-delay-2">Register for $225 →</a>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Footer -->
<footer>
  <div class="container">
    <p>Meet the Moment · <a href="https://mtm.now">mtm.now</a> · An MTM Together Accelerator</p>
    <p style="margin-top:8px;">Built with care by Joshua Peskay & Kim Snyder</p>
  </div>
</footer>

<!-- Scroll reveal -->
<script>
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('visible'); } });
  }, { threshold: 0.1, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });
  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
</script>

</body>
</html>

tool_input.old_string:
Does this work with Google Workspace for Nonprofits (the free tier)?

Yes! Many Gemini features are available across all tiers, and we'll clearly show which features are available at your license level. Some advanced features require Gemini for Workspace add-on, and we'll explain the costs and whether it's worth it for your organization.

We use Microsoft 365, not Google. Is this course for us?

This course is specifically designed for Google Workspace users. If your organization uses Microsoft 365, keep an eye on our upcoming accelerators — or contact us about a custom engagement. The principles transfer, but the hands-on exercises are Google-specific.
tool_input.new_string:
Does this work with Google Workspace for Nonprofits (the free tier)?

Gemini features in Docs, Sheets, and Gmail require a Gemini add-on or Business/Enterprise tier. However, NotebookLM, AI Studio, and standalone Gemini are free for anyone with a Google account. We'll clearly map what's available at your license level in Week 1, and help you make the case for upgrades if the ROI is there.

What's the difference between Gemini, Gems, and NotebookLM?

Gemini is Google's AI assistant — it lives inside your Workspace apps (Gmail, Docs, Sheets) and helps you write, analyze, and create. Gems are custom AI personas you build on top of Gemini — think of them as specialized experts trained for your specific tasks. NotebookLM is a research tool where you upload documents and ask questions — it gives you answers grounded in your sources with citations. They're complementary, and we cover all three.
